extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT won Stage 20 ITT (his third stage of the race), while VINGEGAARD sealed overall victory by extending his lead over POGAČAR by 8 seconds.
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT repeated his Stage 20 ITT victory from 2021, suggesting Jumbo-Visma has systematic late-Tour ITT preparation advantage.
VINGEGAARD visibly eased near finish after confirming safety margin, prioritizing GC security over stage hunting once gaps confirmed.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Third stage win of 2022 Tour matching 2021 total, won both Stage 20 ITTs consecutive years.
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Extended GC lead by 8s in final ITT despite appearing to soft-pedal finish, complete control.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Second-best time shows 2018 winner maintains elite ITT form, likely reporting course intel to team.
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: neutral: Referenced as course scout for THOMAS, revealing Team Ineos uses early starters for recon intelligence.
